title: Shirahoshi Is Forced to Flee
description: On pages 4–7, this part follows Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Shirahoshi, Luffy, Narrator, Vander Decken, King Neptune. The core story beat is shirahoshi is forced to flee.
scene: The scene centers on shirahoshi is forced to flee, with Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Shirahoshi, Luffy, Narrator, Vander Decken, King Neptune driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've got you now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey!! What are you playing at?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Straw hat pirates!!! Your villainy ends here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Don't take the people of fishman Island lightly!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I remember you too, now!! You're one of those fiends from Arlong's lot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: E - Excuse me... it isn't like that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffy- Sama was only...

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: It's all right now, Princess! We'll see that these fiends are all exe- cuted...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey, you guys!! Something's flying right this way!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What?! There's no point trying to distract us with ridiculous lies!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! th - there really is something flying this way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eh!?!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: C... could that be... Vander Becken?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've found you nooooo!!! I know it!!! Bahohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohoh

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Shirahoshii!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Vander Decken- SAMA...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: After all this time in hiding...

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: princess, you have to flee!! We'll take care of him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: answer me this, Shirahoshioshoshoshoshosh!!! Say "Yes", and you won't have to die!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Bahohoh! My dear Shirahoshii...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Marry Meeee!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: The man who's tried to take the Princess' life countless times is Brazenly proposing to her?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're not my type...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is that the issue here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The second day, I'll

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How dare you... trample all over my ten years of longing...?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You would choose another... over me?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you will not love me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...then your very existence is an insult!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: DIE, SHIRAHOSH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Princess Shira- Hosh!!! You have to Flee!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't run away, crybaby!!! Stay right where you are!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: What the heck are you talking about?! Are you one of decken's cronies?! Are you telling the Princess to die?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you go too far away...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I won't be able to protect you!!!

summary: Shirahoshi Is Forced to Flee. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
